changelog:
Startup:
• The splash screen now shows reliably when you open the app.

WhatsApp:
• Your WhatsApp session is kept after updating — no more Clear Data + re-scanning the QR code.

What's new:
• 'Check for Updates' button added to the About window (Ctrl+Q).

Note: this update properly delivers the splash & WhatsApp fixes that did not take effect in 2.8.14.
